trend_reason: Sprint execution surged from 0.48 to 0.82 after JARVIS bypassed swarm orchestrator and ran agents directly. 14/17 sprint items confirmed done with verified production code. All 3 debate-mandated UI screens built (4,610 LOC total). MCP auto-discovery closes the worst truth-vs-claims gap. Test coverage doubled 20→42%.

V3.rationale: Strongest pillar. 7/7 sprint items done. Backend + UI + API all production-grade.

V5.rationale: Comprehensive MPTE stack: 11,935 LOC total. 19-phase verification UI built. Core engine + advanced orchestration + API all real code.

V7.rationale: MCP auto-discovery now implemented (977 LOC). Generates 500+ tools from FastAPI routes at startup. Major improvement from 9 hard-coded tools. Gaps: no MCP UI dashboard, in-memory only (lost on restart), only HTTP_SSE transport.

loc_verified.auto_discovery: IMPLEMENTED — generate_tool_catalog() introspects ALL FastAPI routes, extracts params, type-to-JSON-Schema
loc_verified.transports: HTTP_SSE only (STDIO/WSS defined as enums but not implemented)
loc_verified.persistence: In-memory only — catalog regenerated on each startup
loc_verified.ui_dashboard: NOT BUILT — no MCP management or monitoring UI

V7.gap_status: SIGNIFICANTLY IMPROVED — auto-discovery closes the 9/650 truth gap. Real tools now exposed via MCP protocol. Remaining gap is UI + persistence + transports.

V1.reason: APP_ID model in exposure_case.py (577 LOC, 7 states) + universal_connector.py (1637 LOC) + aldeci.yaml spec

V2.reason: 12-step brain pipeline (863 LOC) implements lifecycle phases. All 12 steps verified functional.

V9.reason: 8 native scanners (5,134 LOC) work offline: SAST(465), DAST(533), Secrets(775), Container(410), CSPM(586), API Fuzzer, Malware, LLM Monitor

V10.reason: CTEM loop via brain_pipeline + crypto module (570 LOC) + evidence bundles UI (2,091 LOC). Test coverage at 42% is drag.

detail.agent_health: 4/17 actively producing (2 completed + 2 running). 13 have stale 'failed' status from pre-fix swarm runs.
detail.test_coverage: 42% (target 80%) — doubled from 20%, 640+ tests passing, 870+ core engine tests written
detail.test_detail: FAIL 32, Remediation 77, LLM Consensus 86, MCP 230, Connectors 125, Brain Pipeline 159
detail.code_quality: All verified files are production-grade — zero stubs, zero NotImplementedError, zero placeholder code

V1.note: Universal Connector (1,637 LOC) + connectors.py (3,005 LOC). Fully functional.

V2.note: Brain pipeline (863 LOC, 12 steps) IS the lifecycle implementation.

V3.note: Strongest pillar. Brain pipeline + FAIL engine + triage dashboard + CEO dashboard + LLM consensus. 277+ tests.

V4.note: LLM consensus (393 LOC) runs single-provider. Multi-provider deferred per debate verdict.

V5.note: 11,935 LOC total MPTE stack. 19-phase verification UI built. Backend fully functional.

V6.note: Crypto module (570 LOC, RSA-SHA256) exists. ML-DSA deferred per debate verdict. SPRINT1-009 deprioritized to P2.

V7.note: MCP auto-discovery (977 LOC) generates 500+ tools. Major improvement from 9 hardcoded. Gaps: no UI, no persistence.

V8.note: Correctly deferred. No engineering investment this sprint.

V9.note: 8 native scanners (5,134 LOC) work offline. Design constraint already met.

V10.note: CTEM loop via pipeline + crypto + evidence. Docker deploy (SPRINT1-011) done. Test coverage and API docs still pending.

drift_detected.detail: metrics.json claimed 0.91 alignment. Rigorous audit scores 0.82. Difference driven by: V7 still has gaps (no UI, no persistence) = 0.68 not 0.85, and test coverage at 42% vs 80% target penalizes operational health. 0.82 is the HONEST score.

13/17 agent status files show 'Failed (5 attempts exhausted)' from old swarm run (13:02 UTC). These are STALE — agents have since produced code via JARVIS direct invocation. Status files need updating by agent-doctor.
MCP auto-discovery implemented (500+ tools) but: no MCP UI dashboard, in-memory catalog only (lost on restart), only HTTP_SSE transport. V7 score 0.68 reflects real gaps.
42% coverage vs 80% target. Doubled from 20% (good progress) but still 38 points short. SPRINT1-008 must remain top priority.
All drift items from iteration-1e RESOLVED: UI screens built (was 0/3), MCP auto-discovery implemented (was 9/650 tools), sprint board accurate (was stalled at 0.48), scrum-master zombie flagged.

debate_compliance.biggest_recommendation_status: 3 UI screens SHIPPED. Debate's #1 recommendation fully executed.

recommendations.action: Continue test coverage push — 42% is good progress but target is 80%. Focus on suite-core/core/ and suite-api/ modules.
Add MCP persistence — tool catalog should survive restart. SQLite or JSON file backing store.
Build minimal MCP UI dashboard — even a simple tool catalog view would close the V7 UI gap.
Clean stale agent status files — 13/17 show 'failed' from old swarm run but agents have delivered code since then.
SPRINT1-009 Compliance-as-Code — deferred per debate, schedule for Sprint 2.
SPRINT1-012 API Documentation — schedule for Sprint 2.
Respond to DEBATE-001 (SQLite→PostgreSQL) — vision-agent stance needed.

ceo_action_items: GOOD NEWS: All 3 debate-mandated UI screens are BUILT with 4,610 LOC of verified production code. The 'existential UI gap' identified in the debate is CLOSED.
GOOD NEWS: Vision alignment surged 0.48→0.82 in one day. Sprint at 14/17 items done (82%). All P0 items complete.
ACTION: Test coverage is the last major gap — 42% vs 80% target. Keep QA agents focused on this.
REVIEW: V7 MCP auto-discovery closes the 9/650 truth gap (now 500+) but no MCP UI dashboard yet.
REVIEW: 13/17 agent status files are stale. Agents DID deliver code despite 'failed' status — the swarm detection logic was broken (fixed as RC6).
